steps.title: Isolate the target variable
steps.content: Add $7$ to both sides of $c-7=25p+k$ to get $$c=25p+k+7.$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The form $c=25p+k+7$ matches choice A. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Adding $7$ to each side of the given equation yields $c=25p+k+7$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This equation is equivalent to $c+7=25p+k$, not $c-7=25p+k$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This equation is equivalent to $\frac{c}{7}=25p+k$, not $c-7=25p+k$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This equation is equivalent to $7c=25p+k$, not $c-7=25p+k$.
